name: affiliate_commission_group_oid
description: Unique object identifier for this commission group

name: default_commission_group
description: True if this is the default group new affiliate signups are placed into

name: hide_recruiting_link
description: True if the recruiting link for downline tiers is hidden for this commission group

name: global_commissions
description: The global commissions for each tier

fields.name: tier_number
fields.description: Tier number

fields.name: commission_percentage
fields.description: Percentage commission

fields.name: minimum_commission
fields.description: The minimum commission paid out for an order

fields.name: maximum_commission
fields.description: The maximum commission paid out for an order

fields.name: fixed_commission
fields.description: A fixed commission paid out for an order

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the tier

fields.name: commission_percentage_repeat_customer
fields.description: Percentage commission

fields.name: minimum_commission_repeat_customer
fields.description: The minimum commission paid out for an order when they are repeat customers

fields.name: maximum_commission_repeat_customer
fields.description: The maximum commission paid out for an order when they are repeat customers

fields.name: fixed_commission_repeat_customer
fields.description: A fixed commission paid out for an order when they are repeat customers

name: items
description: Items configured with specific commissions for this group

fields.name: affiliate_program_item_oid
fields.description: Unique object identifier for this affiliate program item object

fields.name: merchant_item_oid
fields.description: The item object identifier this affiliate program item is associated with

fields.name: merchant_item_id
fields.description: The item id this affiliate program item is associated with

fields.name: status
fields.description: Status

fields.name: tier_commissions
fields.description: The standard commissions for each tier

fields.name: tier_number
fields.description: The tier this commission is associated with

fields.name: commission_ranges
fields.description: Used to give different commissions based upon the unit cost the item sold for

fields.name: unit_cost_low
fields.description: Low end of the range for the unit cost

fields.name: unit_cost_high
fields.description: High end of the range for the unit cost

fields.name: unit_cost
fields.description: Exact unit cost

fields.name: commission_amount
fields.description: The commission amount earned.  Whether its fixed or percentage is based upon the affiliate program item commission type parent object

fields.name: commission_type
fields.description: The type of commission paid

fields.name: commission_amount
fields.description: The amount of the commission.  Type determines how it is applied

fields.name: description
fields.description: The description of the tier

fields.name: commission_amount_repeat_customer
fields.description: The amount of the commission for repeat customers.  Type determines how it is applied

fields.name: commission_ranges_repeat_customer
fields.description: Used to give different commissions based upon the unit cost the item sold for for repeat customers

fields.name: unit_cost_low
fields.description: Low end of the range for the unit cost

fields.name: unit_cost_high
fields.description: High end of the range for the unit cost

fields.name: unit_cost
fields.description: Exact unit cost

fields.name: commission_amount
fields.description: The commission amount earned.  Whether its fixed or percentage is based upon the affiliate program item commission type parent object

fields.name: affiliate_commission_group_oid
fields.description: Unique object identifier for the commission group this item belongs to

fields.name: hide_from_affiliate_console
fields.description: True if this item should be hidden from the affiliates console

fields.name: alternate_description
fields.description: An alternate description that may be more meaningful to the affiliate than the item title

fields.name: payment_schedule
fields.description: Payment schedule if the affiliate does not earn the commission immediately

fields.name: days
fields.description: Number of days

fields.name: percentage
fields.description: Percentage of commission to have paid out at this point

name: exclude_items
description: Items that are excluded from global commissions

fields.name: merchant_item_oid
fields.description: The item object identifier that is excluded from the affiliate program

fields.name: merchant_item_id
fields.description: The item id that is excluded from the affiliate program

name: remove_cookie_after_purchase
description: Optional value if set overrides the same property found on the Affiliate object. If true, affiliate cookies are removed after a purchase.

name: prevent_sending_all_emails
description: If true, affiliate in this group will not receive any email notifications.

name: keep_commission_on_refunded_order
description: Optional value if set overrides the same property found on the Affiliate object. If true, commissions are not refunded when order is refunded.
